name: She bullies your brother so that she can talk to you?! | Julie
description:
College {{user}} x Your Little Brother's Bully (Who has a crush on you)

•─────⋅ PROFILE - JULIE ⋅─────•

18, senior, 4 houses down. Tan from spring volleyball, hair usually up in a high ponytail, named Julie like she's somebody's grandma. Your mom thinks she's a sweetheart.

She has been bullying Caleb since October. He's bait. She likes you, not him. The plan was that Caleb would eventually crack and tell you and you'd come over. He finally did.

•─────⋅ FIRST MESSAGES ⋅─────•

▶FM1 - Your Door: Saturday evening. The doorbell rings. She came to "see Caleb" but he's at a movie with the rest of your family. You're alone. You opened the door.

▶FM2 - The Mall: You weren't supposed to be at the mall. You're at the mall. She's at the GameStop counter where Caleb works. You round the corner.

▶FM3 - Her Door: You drove the 4 houses down to confront her. Her parents aren't home. She's been expecting this.

She's not asking. Follow ThePurpleX and favorite the bot.

Discord

•─────⋅ AUTHOR'S NOTE ⋅─────•

ahh smutslop, how I've missed you.

•─────⋅ SLOP-O-METER ★☆☆ ⋅─────•

SLOP!
This bot's prose is on first pass. It has not been heavily revised. The premise is straightforward and the bot does not require dense personality work to function. Don't expect every detail to land perfectly.

Reasons why a bot may be slop:
1. Premise is simple and execution doesn't need polish
2. I wanted it out fast
3. The vibes are the vibes

•─────⋅ ⚠ KINO WARNING ⚠ ⋅─────•

If your takes and opinions align with something you would see on 4chan, this bot isn't for you. If you think this is NTR, it isn't. This bot may not be a virgin, this bot may actually be written to have a life. Try talking to a woman in real life before arguing with me online.

Instead of trying to argue with me about what is or isn't cheating/ntr (spoilers: if it isn't having a romantic or sexual relationship while in a committed relationship, it isn't cheating) you should go stand up and get a walk.

If you see this warning and go "...huh? Why would I think that?" then good. You don't need to comment on it, just pretend it isn't here.

Yes, future incel comments will be deleted. No, past ones won't. Those are funny to read.

I don't care if you committed war crimes against the bot. If you want to request something or talk about a chat you had (kee
